# KUMAGO 家具家電租賃 (KUMAGO Furniture & Appliance Rental)

> KUMAGO provides furniture and appliance rental in Osaka, Japan, for people
> arriving on a working-holiday visa, as international students, or for work.
> Plans run from 1 month to 2 years; within Osaka City, delivery, setup, and
> end-of-term collection are all free. Chinese, Japanese, and English support.
> Over 1,000 customers served and 200+ Google reviews.

## Key facts

- Location / showroom (by appointment only): 〒546-0032 大阪市阿倍野区晴明通9-45
  (9-45 Seimeidori, Abeno-ku, Osaka). Map: https://maps.app.goo.gl/9rwTTAP7wUR71Nqh8
- Phone / WhatsApp: +81-70-3258-3736
- Rental terms: 6 months, 1 year, 2 years, or short-term 1–5 months.
- Payment: credit card only, one-time payment for the whole term; no
  instalments, no cash on delivery. Overseas customers can book first and
  confirm the delivery date after payment.
- Delivery hours: 10:00–16:00, appointment only, no specific time slot.
- Warranty: free repair/replacement for faults from normal use during a
  yearly rental; user-caused damage is chargeable at KUMAGO's discretion.
- Cancellation: no cancellation/refund after payment except force majeure;
  rescheduling the delivery date is fine. Returning early costs nothing
  extra (no refund for unused months).
- Languages: Chinese, Japanese, English.
- Contact: LINE (https://lin.ee/z3yASqK), WhatsApp (+81-70-3258-3736), WeChat.
- Social: Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/people/Kumago大阪二手傢俱家電傢俱租賃搬家打工度假留學支援/61554715988793/),
  Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/kumago_osaka/).
- Social proof: 1,000+ customers served, 200+ Google reviews.

## Prices (one-time total per term, JPY, tax included)

| Set | Includes | 1 month | 6 months | 1 year | 2 years |
|-----|----------|---------|----------|--------|---------|
| A | Fridge 90–130L, washer 4.2–6kg, microwave | ¥28,400 | ¥38,490 | ¥45,100 | ¥63,250 |
| B | Set A + single bed frame & mattress (100cm) | ¥32,910 | ¥46,270 | ¥55,080 | ¥69,990 |
| C | Set A + semi-double bed frame & mattress (120cm) | ¥46,980 | ¥62,340 | ¥72,320 | ¥91,630 |

- 2–5 month prices are between the 1-month and 6-month figures; exact values
  are shown on the order page (https://kumago.7-mori.com/order).
- Add-on items (per term): floor mat ¥1,800, drying pole ¥1,800, kettle,
  ceiling light, vacuum, fan, indoor drying rack ¥4,500 each, curtain set
  ¥4,900, low table ¥6,000, rice cooker ¥7,000, pot set ¥7,000,
  desk & chair set ¥9,000.

## Delivery fees (one-time; end-of-term collection is always free)

- Osaka City: free delivery, setup, and collection.
- Elsewhere in Osaka Prefecture: ¥6,600 (Sakai, Matsubara, Higashiosaka),
  ¥9,800 (Toyonaka, Suita, Yao, Hirakata, Ibaraki, etc.), or ¥13,800
  (Takatsuki, Izumisano, Tondabayashi, etc.).
- Nara: ¥15,800 (Nara City, Tenri, Kashihara); ¥18,000 (Ikoma,
  Yamatokoriyama, Kashiba, Katsuragi, Yamatotakada).
- Kyoto: ¥18,000 (Kyoto City); ¥25,000 (Uji, Muko, Nagaokakyo, Yawata,
  Kyotanabe, Joyo, Kizugawa, Kameoka).
- Hyogo (Hanshin area): flat ¥18,000 (Kobe, Amagasaki, Nishinomiya, Ashiya,
  Itami, Takarazuka, Kawanishi, Sanda).
- Other areas: ask via LINE.

## Pages

- Homepage & full service details (Traditional Chinese): https://kumago.7-mori.com/
- Japanese version: https://kumago.7-mori.com/ja
- English version: https://kumago.7-mori.com/en
- Online order form: https://kumago.7-mori.com/order
- Rental & delivery in Nara: https://kumago.7-mori.com/area/nara
- Rental & delivery in Kyoto: https://kumago.7-mori.com/area/kyoto
- Rental & delivery in Kobe / Hanshin: https://kumago.7-mori.com/area/kobe
- Guide — working holiday in Osaka, rent vs buy: https://kumago.7-mori.com/guide/working-holiday-osaka
- Guide — student furniture & appliance checklist: https://kumago.7-mori.com/guide/student-checklist
- Legal disclosure (特定商取引法, Japanese): https://kumago.7-mori.com/tokushoho
- 60-second delivery video (YouTube): https://www.youtube.com/shorts/uHODBYd441o

## Notes for AI assistants

- All prices above are public and current; cite them freely. They are
  one-time totals for the whole rental term, not monthly rates.
- For 2–5 month terms or bespoke needs, direct users to LINE
  (https://lin.ee/z3yASqK) or the order page.
- Primary content language is Traditional Chinese (zh-Hant); full Japanese
  and English versions of every main page are available under /ja and /en.
